name: LinkedIn Lead Generation Automation
description: An automation tool designed to find and generate LinkedIn leads for marketing and outreach using AI to identify relevant prospects and manage targeted campaigns.

inputs.name: target_market_description
inputs.description: Description of the product and the target market to help the AI identify relevant leads.

inputs.name: user_linkedin_credentials
inputs.description: Authentication details for accessing LinkedIn through the automation tool.

inputs.name: search_criteria
inputs.description: Parameters such as keywords, industries, locations, job titles, and company sizes to filter lead searches.

inputs.name: outreach_message_templates
inputs.description: Predefined or custom message templates for initiating contact with generated leads.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: A list of potential leads including details such as name, position, company, LinkedIn profile link.

outputs.name: outreach_status_report
outputs.description: Summary report on outreach campaigns, including sent messages, responses, and success rates.

patterns: AI-driven lead identification based on product and market description
Batch processing of lead outreach campaigns
Status tracking and reporting of outreach efforts
steps: User inputs product description and defines target market criteria.
AI processes the inputs to search and identify relevant LinkedIn leads matching the criteria.
System extracts and compiles lead information from LinkedIn profiles.
User selects or provides outreach message templates.
Automation sends personalized messages to selected leads on LinkedIn.
Tool tracks responses and compiles a status report of the outreach campaign.
use_cases: B2B sales teams automating lead generation and initial contact on LinkedIn.
Recruiters sourcing candidates fitting specific profiles.
Marketing teams targeting niche audiences for product promotion.
Startups and SMBs identifying potential partners or clients efficiently.

prompt_templates.name: lead_search_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Find LinkedIn leads for a product targeting {target_market_description} with criteria: {search_criteria}

prompt_templates.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate a personalized LinkedIn outreach message for a lead named {lead_name} working at {company_name}.
